items.title: PhD in Informatics
items.event: University of Luxembourg · cotutelle with University of Bologna
items.role: PhD in Law, Science and Technology (Bologna)
items.description: Thesis: "Hybrid Artificial Intelligence to Extract Patterns and Rules from Argumentative and Legal Texts". Supervisors: Prof. Monica Palmirani (Bologna) and Prof. Leon van der Torre (Luxembourg).

items.title: MSc in Computing
items.description: Research topics included Machine Learning, Network Security, Data Wrangling, and Programming for the Web.

items.title: Academic Service
items.description: Reviewer for: **Artificial Intelligence Journal** · **AI & Law Journal** · **Argument Mining Workshop** · **ICAIL** (International Conference on AI and Law) · **JURIX** (International Conference on Legal Knowledge and Information Systems) · and more...

items.title: Hobbies
items.description: Studied **violin** at the Conservatory of Palermo and the Conservatory of Bologna. Also plays **guitar**.
